content.speakerText: I can't access the ProQuest database. What should I do?
content.speakerTextCn: 我无法访问ProQuest数据库，该怎么办？

options.text: Just type the website URL directly into your browser.
Use your student ID and campus password through the library's proxy link.
You need to pay a fee to unlock access to ProQuest.
Ask your professor to send you the articles directly.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调通过图书馆代理链接使用学号和校园密码登录，这是访问付费数据库的标准流程。选项1忽略了认证步骤，选项3错误地暗示需付费，选项4虽可能有效但不是官方推荐的访问方式。

content.speakerText: I tried logging into ScienceDirect but it keeps saying 'access denied'. Why?
content.speakerTextCn: 我尝试登录ScienceDirect，但一直显示'访问被拒绝'，为什么？

options.text: Your internet connection is too slow.
You're probably not logged in through the university's library portal.
ScienceDirect doesn't support academic users anymore.
You need to install special software to access it.

content.explanation: 正确答案指出必须通过大学图书馆门户登录才能获得授权访问。选项1是技术误解，选项3是错误事实，选项4混淆了访问方式（通常无需安装软件）。

content.speakerText: Can I download journal articles from home?
content.speakerTextCn: 我能在家里下载期刊文章吗？

options.text: No, you must be on campus to download anything.
Yes, if you log in through the library’s remote access system.
Only if you subscribe to each journal individually.
You can only view articles online, not download them.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调通过图书馆远程访问系统（如VPN或代理）可在校外访问资源。选项1和4错误地限制了访问权限，选项3忽略了学校已购买的订阅权限。

content.template: You need to log in via the library's website first, then use your ___ and campus password.
content.hint: 这是访问数据库时最常被要求的身份凭证
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（学生身份凭证）

content.template: If you're off campus, try the ___ link on the library homepage to access subscribed databases.
content.hint: 这是图书馆提供的校外访问技术名称

content.template: To access JSTOR, make sure you're connected to the university ___ before logging in.
content.hint: 有时需要连接校园网络才能自动认证

content.speakerText: I can't get into JSTOR—do I need a special login?
content.speakerTextCn: 我登不上JSTOR，需要特殊账号吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, use your student ID and campus password.
You should log in through the library’s website first using your university credentials.
Try accessing it via the proxy link on the library’s homepage—it’s the easiest way from off campus.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确指出需要使用学号和校园密码（关键信息）
是否使用了正确的术语如 'proxy link', 'campus password', 'library website'
表达是否自然流畅，符合口语习惯，无语法错误

content.speakerText: I'm trying to download a paper from ScienceDirect, but it says I don't have access. What should I do?
content.speakerTextCn: 我正试图从ScienceDirect下载一篇论文，但显示我没有访问权限，该怎么办？
expectedAnswers: Make sure you're logged in through the university library portal.
You probably need to use the proxy link—check the library’s remote access page.
If you're off campus, connect to the university VPN first, then try again.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确识别访问限制的原因（未通过图书馆认证）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'proxy link', 'university portal', 'VPN'
回答是否结构清晰、逻辑完整，有实际操作步骤

content.speakerText: Can I access electronic journals from my home country?
content.speakerTextCn: 我能在我的祖国访问电子期刊吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, as long as you log in through the library’s remote access system with your student credentials.
You can access them from anywhere if you use the library’s proxy server or VPN.
It depends on your location—some databases block certain countries, but the proxy usually works.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确说明可通过图书馆远程系统访问（意图达成）
是否使用了 'remote access', 'proxy server', 'VPN', 'student credentials' 等关键词
是否表达自然，能体现对技术术语的准确理解和口语化表达
